calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-06-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Andrew William Schwartz, Esq., DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY 554-4620, for defendants City and County of San Francisco, S. F. Dept. of Public Works and Board of Supervisor moving for summary judgment
Stephen Michael Williams, Esq. of FITZGERALD, ABBOTT & BEARDSLEY 510/451-3300, for petitioners and opposing party Margaret Ropchan and Franklin Corridor Preservation Committee
William H. Orrick, III Esq. of COBLENTZ, PATCH 391-4800, for intervenor TSP San Francisco Development, LP

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- Motion granted. No triable issue of fact re: statute of limitation. Failure to join necessary/indispensable parties. Moving party is to prepare an order pursuant to CCP 437c(g). (DAG/301/EH) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-06-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
William H. Orrick, III Esq. of COBLENTZ, PATCH 391-4800, for intervenor TSP San Francisco Development, LP moving for summary judgment
Stephen Michael Williams, Esq. of FITZGERALD, ABBOTT & BEARDSLEY 510/451-3300, for petitioners and opposing party Margaret Ropchan and Franklin Corridor Preservation Committee
Andrew William Schwartz, Esq., DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY 554-4620, for defendants City and County of San Francisco, S. F. Dept. of Public Works and Board of Supervisor

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- Motion for summary judgment is granted. No triable issue of fact re: statute of limitation. Failure to join necessary/indispensable parties. Moving party is to prepare an order pursuant to CCP 437c(g). (DAG/301/EH) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
